plugins.name: rogue-build-scenario
plugins.description: Build and manage Rogue Arena scenarios — brainstorm company context and infrastructure via YML blueprints, implement via MCP tools, freeform canvas editing, and deployment debugging

plugins.name: rogue-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Local-first Ansible plugin development — brainstorm projects, research offline install approaches, and iterate on Ansible YAML with human-driven builds

plugins.name: rogue-curriculum-builder
plugins.description: Build and edit Rogue Arena curriculum content — chapters, sections, CTF nodes, media, unlock keys, and content blocks

plugins.name: rogue-active-deployment
plugins.description: Operate on a user's running Rogue Arena deployment — list VMs, execute commands, browse filesystems, manage snapshots, transfer files
